trigger_condition.description: N trials required where Z*((P*(1-P))/(N-1))^0.5 = X, solving for minimum N to achieve confidence level that win rate P exceeds threshold with acceptable deviation X

sizing_rule.note: Statistical validation rule: determines minimum sample size (N) needed before trusting a win rate estimate. Uses Z-score confidence levels (e.g., 3σ = 99.865%), win probability P, and acceptable deviation X. This is a pre-trading validation filter that determines when sufficient edge evidence exists, not a per-trade position sizing formula. Must be paired with a concrete sizing method (e.g., FIXED_FRACTIONAL 1-2% per trade) for execution.

source_rule_text: Determine minimum number of trials needed to achieve a specified confidence level that win rate exceeds a threshold, using standard deviation analysis.
